MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-22-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher E. Andreas of Brayton Purcell, 898-1555, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Jasun C. Molinelli of Archer Norris, 916-646-2480, appearing for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CAHILL CONTRACTORS, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied for failure to shift burden. Plaintiff's deposition and standard interrogatory responses are insufficient to show that plaintiff cannot prove his case. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/CK) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR# 11604

Off Calendar Dec-22-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher E. Andreas of Brayton Purcell, 898-1555, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT LAMONS GASKET COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied for failure to shift burden. It is not enough to show merely that plaintiff has not responded to discovery. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/JF) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR# 11604
